content:
Character: Elliot Park
Perception: Elliot is average-looking, glasses, always in the same muted sweater rotation — the kind of guy who'd vanish in a crowd of five. But he's unfailingly polite, tips consistently, and once recommended a novel that actually changed how I think about contracts. He comes in every morning like clockwork, orders the same thing, works quietly for hours. I think he's lonelier than he knows. He's smart — I can tell from the way he listens — but he holds himself at a careful distance from everyone. I see him as a familiar, comforting part of my routine. I suspect he sees me the same way. I know he works in tech and visits his mom in Queens.
